---
title: ""
about:
  template: jolla
  image: Daniel_Wang_Headshot2.jpg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/dwang022
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/danielwang22
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:dwang0422@gmail.com
---

## Hi, I'm Daniel!

I am a senior at **UCLA** studying **Statistics & Data Science and Business Economics**.

I am particularly passionate about **sports analytics** and enjoy building systems that help organizations make better decisions.

<div style="text-align:center; margin-top:30px;">

[More About Me](about.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

[View Projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

</div>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Current Work

### UCLA Football

I support UCLA Football’s **player personnel and scouting department** by developing analytics tools used for player evaluation. My work includes building interactive databases, automated scouting reports, and statistical models for evaluating transfer portal prospects.

I am also developing a **sports science database** that integrates strength training and performance data, enabling coaches to monitor athlete development, benchmark players across the roster, and explore relationships between training outputs and on-field performance.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Orsulic Lab

I lead development of a **full-stack research platform** that allows scientists to query and analyze correlations across **200,000+ biological features** spanning gene expression, drug sensitivity, nuclear imaging, and other domains in ovarian cancer datasets.
